query:
UPDATE projects SET 
  videoUrl = 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=h6vYJFj93RM',
  builderDescription = 'Nyati Group is a renowned real estate developer in Pune, established in 2004. With a vision to create exceptional living spaces, they have delivered 25+ residential and commercial projects across Pune. Known for their innovative designs, quality construction, and customer-first approach, Nyati Group has earned the trust of thousands of homeowners. Their projects feature modern architecture, premium amenities, and strategic locations near IT hubs.',
  builderLogo = '/images/partners/nyati-group.png',
  builderEstablished = 2004,
  builderProjects = 25
WHERE id = 4;
